hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const fp=j.tool_input?.file_path;if(fp&&/(route\.ts$|[\\/]actions[\\/]|[\\/]server\.ts$)/.test(fp)){const fs=require('fs');const c=fs.existsSync(fp)?fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8'):'';if(c.includes('createBrowserClient')){console.error('⚠️  [Server/Client Guard] '+fp.split(/[\\/]/).pop()+' 에서 createBrowserClient 감지!\n   → lib/supabase/server.ts 의 createServerClient() 사용 필요');process.exit(2)}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('npm run lint --silent',{stdio:'pipe',encoding:'utf8'});console.log('✅ ESLint: 문제 없음')}catch(e){const out=(e.stdout||'')+(e.stderr||'');const lines=out.split('
').filter(l=>l.includes('error')||l.includes('warning')).slice(0,15);if(lines.length)console.log('⚠️  ESLint 이슈:
'+lines.join('
'))}"
